title: Evaluator Spec
description: Advisory buyer-attached pointer (#5280) declaring HOW produced build_creative variants should be judged. Informs the agent's best_of_n recommended/rank and, when the agent advertises creative.supports_evaluator, populates a per-leaf `eval` block (evaluator-result.json) on the response. Advisory only: it MUST NOT hard-block at the AdCP layer and does not change what is produced or billed. An unreachable or unknown evaluator degrades to seller-default ranking with an advisory errors[] note (non-terminal), NOT a failure. Provide exactly one of three forms; a shared optional eval_budget applies to whichever form is chosen.

eval_budget.description: Optional soft ceiling on evaluation effort. Advisory in v1 with no billing coupling. Well-known soft fields max_calls / max_seconds; open for evaluator-specific knobs.

max_calls.description: Soft cap on the number of judge calls the evaluator should make.

max_seconds.description: Soft cap on wall-clock seconds the evaluation should consume.

oneOf.description: Exemplar form: inline pass/fail calibration examples. Mirrors content-standards.json calibration_exemplars (artifact-based) — a creative variant is content to be judged.

exemplars.description: Calibration pass/fail examples that anchor the evaluator's notion of 'good'. Artifact-based, mirroring content-standards.json calibration_exemplars.

pass.description: Artifacts exemplifying variants the buyer considers good.

fail.description: Artifacts exemplifying variants the buyer considers bad.

oneOf.description: Identifier form: an account-scoped house evaluator. Its resolution surface (list_evaluators) is a noted follow-on; evaluator_id resolves out-of-band until then.

evaluator_id.description: Account-scoped house evaluator selected by the buyer. Discovery via list_evaluators is a follow-on RFC; until it lands, this resolves out-of-band. An unknown id degrades to seller-default ranking (advisory errors[] note), not a failure.

oneOf.description: Agent form: an external judge agent the seller calls to score leaves.

agent_url.description: URL of an external judge agent the seller calls to score the produced leaves. An unreachable agent degrades to seller-default ranking (advisory errors[] note), not a failure.
